title: Walk-Forward Optimization, Backtesting & WFE Validation
summary: Rolling 6-month train / 1-month test windows to calibrate and validate 9-dimension signal weights. Implements Walk-Forward Efficiency (WFE) ratio metric: measures how well in-sample optimized parameters transfer out-of-sample. WFE > 0.5 required before deploying weight changes. Prevents overfit strategies from going live.
approach: Rolling 60-day train / 20-day test windows. Optimize dimension weights via scipy.minimize on Sharpe. Constrain weights to prevent overfitting. Update weekly.
expected_impact: Prevents deploying overfit strategies; >90% of quant strategies fail without proper WFO
